title: Friendly Movies Streamed Last Month
description: Find titles of movies rated for kids that were streamed in October 2020.
constraints: content_id is the primary key of Content
(content_id, program_date, start_time, end_time) is the primary key of TVProgram
content_type is one of: Movies, Series, etc.
key_concept: JOIN + multiple WHERE filters (category and date range).

hints.L1: Join TVProgram with Content on content_id. Filter where Kids_content = 'Y' and October 2020.
hints.L2: WHERE c.Kids_content = 'Y' AND MONTH(t.program_date) = 10 AND YEAR(t.program_date) = 2020
hints.L3: SELECT DISTINCT c.title FROM TVProgram t JOIN Content c ON t.content_id = c.content_id WHERE c.Kids_content = 'Y' AND YEAR(t.program_date) = 2020 AND MONTH(t.program_date) = 10
